services.title: IT & Management Consulting
services.desc: Strategic technology advisory for enterprises navigating complex digital transformation programs. From roadmap design to governance frameworks.

services.title: Interim IT Leadership
services.desc: Stepping in as an experienced CIO, CTO, or program director to stabilize, lead, and drive critical technology initiatives to a successful outcome.

services.title: Coaching & Transformation
services.desc: Executive coaching, agile & SAFe coaching, and cultural transformation to build high-performance teams that deliver with accountability and purpose.

services.title: Portfolio Governance & P&L Stewardship
services.desc: End-to-end ownership of multi-million-euro technology portfolios with rigorous financial accountability and delivery predictability.

services.title: Agile / SAFe Release Train Engineering
services.desc: Setting up and facilitating global Agile Release Trains across distributed, multi-country teams. Turning fragmented groups into synchronized delivery engines.

services.title: Cloud & Digital Workplace Transformation
services.desc: Leading cloud migration and modern workplace rollouts for thousands of employees across geographies, with a focus on adoption and business continuity.
